column1: According to Cunha and Heckman (2007), what does the phrase "skills beget skills" mean?
column2: Skills are self-productive and complementary over time, so early investment raises the return to later investment.

column1: What two adult outcomes did the HighScope Perry Preschool Program affect, according to Heckman et al. (2013)?
column2: It raised adult earnings and lowered criminal involvement.

column1: In Heckman et al. (2013), among which group were the returns to the Perry Preschool Program concentrated?
What is well established about the short-run effects of early childhood interventions?
column2: They show strong short-run cognitive gains; what is debated is whether these persist into adulthood and through which channel.

column1: What research gap do the notes identify regarding early childhood programs?
column2: Few studies link field-level program fidelity to long-run outcomes, and the mechanisms remain contested.
